title: Autonomous Council Dispatch and Model Relay
goal: Remove the founder from routine prompt transport between AI systems.
exit: A PERT-ready task is auto-routed through a single enforceable CouncilDispatchGateway to all required seats; responses captured, validated, aggregated, reflected into PERT state without manual copying; no ungated network/subprocess adapter remains.

milestone_1.scope_note: Single controlled node / routed Grok+Ollama spine only. Does not complete parent H1D.

open_p0: H1D.7 Eliminate direct-network bypasses (e.g. scripts/prompt_brain/model_adapters.py::OpenAIAdapter.execute urllib path)
binding_rule: Parent H1D may not be COMPLETED while H1D.7-H1D.12 remain open, while ungated adapters can call urllib/requests/httpx/subprocess/provider SDKs, or while remote reproducibility of the implementation commit is unproven. A single multi-adapter demo advances H1D-M1 only.
prior_incorrect_reason: MULTI_ADAPTER_VALIDATED_EVIDENCE over-applied from one controlled demo to full H1D
